# MCP Tools

OpenWiki MCP tools are generated from the live `tools/list` definitions and
grouped by the minimum mode that exposes each tool. A `proposal` endpoint also
includes all read tools. A `write` endpoint includes read, proposal, and write
tools. Tool mode controls exposure; policy scopes still authorize calls.

Remote HTTP clients can discover the MCP endpoint from `mcp-manifest.json`.
The HTTP endpoint is `/mcp` and supports MCP Streamable
HTTP with protocol version `2025-11-25`.

Tool results are bounded. The default final output ceiling is
`262144` bytes and can be changed with
`OPENWIKI_MCP_TOOL_OUTPUT_MAX_BYTES`. Oversized tool calls return a
truncation envelope with preview JSON and guidance.

| Endpoint mode | Exposed tool count |
| --- | ---: |
| `read` | 37 |
| `proposal` | 47 |
| `write` | 68 |

## Read Mode Tools

Minimum mode: `read`. A `read` server exposes these tools.

| Tool | Title | Required input | Optional input | Read-only hint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `wiki.search` | Search OpenWiki | `query` | `limit`, `persona`, `types`, `mode`, `fuzzy`, `filters`, `offset`, `include_highlights`, `include_explain` | yes |
| `wiki.recall` | Recall OpenWiki Memory | `query` | `limit`, `types`, `include_explain`, `include_highlights` | yes |
| `wiki.ask` | Ask OpenWiki With Citations | `question` | `limit`, `include_explain` | yes |
| `wiki.think` | Think Through OpenWiki With Citations | `question` | `limit`, `include_explain` | yes |
| `wiki.read_page` | Read OpenWiki Page | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.read_source` | Read OpenWiki Source | `id` | `include_content`, `max_bytes` | yes |
| `wiki.read_claim` | Read OpenWiki Claim | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.list_facts` | List OpenWiki Facts | None | `statuses`, `kinds`, `subject_ids`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.read_fact` | Read OpenWiki Fact | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.list_takes` | List OpenWiki Takes | None | `statuses`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.read_take` | Read OpenWiki Take | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.takes_scorecard` | Score OpenWiki Takes | None | None | yes |
| `wiki.find_trajectory` | Find OpenWiki Trajectory | None | `id`, `query`, `limit`, `order` | yes |
| `wiki.list_proposals` | List OpenWiki Proposals | None | `statuses`, `actor_id`, `target_id`, `target_path`, `section_id`, `updated_after`, `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.read_proposal` | Read OpenWiki Proposal | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.read_proposal_detail` | Read OpenWiki Proposal Detail | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.read_decision` | Read OpenWiki Decision | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.trace_claim` | Trace OpenWiki Claim | `id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.get_history` | Get OpenWiki History | `id` | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.diff_versions` | Diff OpenWiki Versions | `id` | `from`, `to` | yes |
| `wiki.list_recent_changes` | List OpenWiki Recent Changes | None | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.git_status` | Read OpenWiki Git Remote Status | None | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.list_events` | List OpenWiki Events | None | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.list_runs` | List OpenWiki Runs | None | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.dream_status` | Read OpenWiki Dream Runs | None | `run_id`, `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.list_topics` | List OpenWiki Topics | None | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.list_open_questions` | List OpenWiki Open Questions | None | None | yes |
| `wiki.inbox_list` | List OpenWiki Inbox Items | None | `statuses`, `owner_actor_id`, `provider`, `kind`, `target_space_id`, `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.inbox_read` | Read OpenWiki Inbox Item | `id` | `include_content`, `max_bytes` | yes |
| `wiki.detect_governance` | Run OpenWiki Governance Detectors | None | `detectors`, `stale_after_days` | yes |
| `wiki.graph_neighbors` | Read OpenWiki Graph Neighbors | `id` | `direction`, `depth`, `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.graph_backlinks` | Read OpenWiki Graph Backlinks | `id` | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.graph_related` | Read OpenWiki Related Graph | `id` | `limit` | yes |
| `wiki.graph_path` | Find OpenWiki Graph Path | `from_id`, `to_id` | None | yes |
| `wiki.graph_orphans` | List OpenWiki Graph Orphans | None | None | yes |
| `wiki.graph_stale` | List OpenWiki Stale Graph Nodes | None | None | yes |
| `wiki.graph_report` | Read OpenWiki Graph Report | None | `limit` | yes |

## Proposal Mode Tools

Minimum mode: `proposal`. A `proposal` server exposes these tools plus lower-mode tools.

| Tool | Title | Required input | Optional input | Read-only hint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `wiki.propose_edit` | Propose OpenWiki Edit | `page_id`, `body` | `title`, `summary`, `actor_id`, `rationale` | no |
| `wiki.propose_synthesis` | Propose OpenWiki Synthesis Page | `title`, `body` | `page_type`, `summary`, `topics`, `source_ids`, `actor_id`, `rationale` | no |
| `wiki.propose_fact` | Propose OpenWiki Fact | `text` | `id`, `kind`, `subject_ids`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `confidence`, `sensitivity`, `status`, `valid_from`, `valid_to`, `actor_id`, `rationale` | no |
| `wiki.propose_take` | Propose OpenWiki Take | `statement` | `id`, `rationale`, `proposal_rationale`, `probability`, `confidence`, `status`, `due_at`, `page_ids`, `source_ids`, `claim_ids`, `actor_id` | no |
| `wiki.resolve_take` | Resolve OpenWiki Take | `id`, `resolution` | `resolved_at`, `actor_id`, `rationale` | no |
| `wiki.forget_fact` | Forget OpenWiki Fact | `id` | `valid_to`, `actor_id`, `rationale` | no |
| `wiki.propose_source` | Propose OpenWiki Source | `title` | `source_type`, `url`, `content_hash`, `actor_id`, `rationale`, `retrieved_at`, `trust` | no |
| `wiki.comment_on_proposal` | Comment On OpenWiki Proposal | `proposal_id`, `body` | `actor_id` | no |
| `wiki.dream_run` | Run OpenWiki Dream Cycle | None | `phases`, `limit`, `timeout_ms`, `dry_run`, `create_proposals`, `provider`, `schema_pack`, `actor_id`, `wait` | no |
| `wiki.inbox_submit` | Submit OpenWiki Inbox Item | `title` | `content`, `kind`, `provider`, `adapter`, `owner_actor_id`, `target_space_id`, `target_path`, `external_id`, `source_url`, `idempotency_key`, `metadata` | no |

## Write Mode Tools

Minimum mode: `write`. A `write` server exposes these tools plus lower-mode tools.

| Tool | Title | Required input | Optional input | Read-only hint |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `wiki.read_policy` | Read OpenWiki Policy | None | None | yes |
| `wiki.list_workspaces` | List OpenWiki Workspaces | None | None | yes |
| `wiki.connect_workspace` | Connect OpenWiki Workspace | None | `remote`, `branch`, `remote_url`, `credential_ref` | no |
| `wiki.propose_policy` | Propose OpenWiki Policy Change | `policy_file`, `body` | `actor_id`, `rationale` | no |
| `wiki.propose_section_policy` | Propose OpenWiki Section Policy | `section_id`, `title`, `paths` | `visibility`, `owner_principal`, `viewer_principals`, `contributor_principals`, `researcher_principals`, `reviewer_principals`, `maintainer_principals`, `admin_principals`, `required_reviewer_principals`, `actor_id`, `rationale` | no |
| `wiki.ingest_source` | Ingest OpenWiki Source | `title` | `source_type`, `url`, `content`, `actor_id` | no |
| `wiki.fetch_source` | Fetch OpenWiki Source | `title` | `url`, `source_type`, `connector_kind`, `connector_id`, `credential_ref`, `github_owner`, `github_repo`, `gitlab_project`, `source_path`, `ref`, `actor_id`, `max_bytes`, `timeout_ms`, `wait` | no |
| `wiki.inbox_process` | Process OpenWiki Inbox Item | `id` | `actor_id`, `dry_run` | no |
| `wiki.inbox_ignore` | Ignore OpenWiki Inbox Item | `id` | `actor_id`, `reason` | no |
| `wiki.inbox_retry` | Retry OpenWiki Inbox Item | `id` | `actor_id`, `reason` | no |
| `wiki.review_proposal` | Review OpenWiki Proposal | `proposal_id`, `decision`, `rationale` | `actor_id` | no |
| `wiki.close_proposal` | Close OpenWiki Proposal | `proposal_id`, `rationale` | `resolution`, `superseded_by`, `actor_id` | no |
| `wiki.apply_proposal` | Apply OpenWiki Proposal | `proposal_id` | `actor_id` | no |
| `wiki.create_synthesis` | Create OpenWiki Synthesis Page | `title`, `body` | `page_type`, `summary`, `topics`, `source_ids`, `actor_id`, `rationale`, `decision_rationale`, `commit`, `message` | no |
| `wiki.run_job` | Run OpenWiki Local Job | `run_type` | `actor_id`, `input`, `wait` | no |
| `wiki.run_lint` | Lint OpenWiki Repository | None | None | no |
| `wiki.commit_changes` | Commit OpenWiki Changes | `message` | `actor_id`, `paths`, `all` | no |
| `wiki.git_pull` | Pull OpenWiki Git Remote | None | `remote`, `branch` | no |
| `wiki.git_push` | Push OpenWiki Git Remote | None | `remote`, `branch` | no |
| `wiki.sync_now` | Sync OpenWiki Git Remote | None | `pull`, `push`, `remote`, `branch`, `actor_id` | no |
| `wiki.publish` | Publish OpenWiki Static Site | None | `out_dir`, `base_url`, `actor_id` | no |
